nextScheduledAction: For an intentional local canary only: set P185_PRODUCTION_STORAGE_CONFIRMED=1 in .env.local after confirming this machine's .data path is the intended durable store for the canary. Do not set this on Vercel without a durable volume.
blockers: P185_PRODUCTION_STORAGE_CONFIRMED is not set — local filesystem health alone does not authorize live sends.
P184 is not enabled in live mode (required for canary execution).
